titleStmt.title: SII 20.116: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 116. (B.K. No. 88 of 1936-37.) YĀRGAL (BHUJRUKH), SINDAGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in Rā0maliṅga temple.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 9, Akshaya, Pushya, śu. 6, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. In the given cyclic year corresponding to A.D. 1146, the given tithi fell on December 10, Tuesday, while the saṁkrānti occurred on December 25, Wednesday, the tithi being ba. 5. The intended date might be A.D. 1146, December 26, Thursday, when the tithi would be ba. 6.

The inscription records a gift of land for the upkeep and repairs of a tank, constructed by Sāntiseṭṭi, by Mahāmaṅḍalēśvara Sōyidēvarasa of the Siḷāra family, Apparasa, the prabhu of Eraṅgal, Nandimarasa and perggaḍe Nākarasa. It gives a genealogical account of Apparasa and Nandimarasa. The king is stated to be ruling from Kalyāṇa. Cf. No. 115 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē © © ©
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttavire samadhigatapaṁca mahāśabda
mahāsāmantādhipati vīralakṣmīpati cāḷukyapratāpacakravartti jagadēkamallanarē svarāsthānaraṁ
garatunapradīpa vārddhīsagōtravārddhivarddhanasudhākara lakhmādēvīmanassarōvara rājahaṁsa nāmādi
samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ piriya daṁḍanāyakaṁ bammaṇayyaṁgaḷanvaya veṁteṁda
ḍe . vritta . janakaṁ viprakuḷāṁbaradyumaṇi viprāṁbhōdhicaṁdraṁ jagajjanavaṁdyaṁ vibhu rēvarājanama
ḷaṁ tāyi sadguṇōpēte peṁpina mākāṁganeyaṇnanūrjjitayaśaṁ maiyiḷāradaṁḍēśa noḷupina tammaṁ
diru ciddayōgane dhanyaṁ bammadaṁḍādhipaṁ . Avara māvaṁ perggaḍe nākarasananva yameṁteṁdaḍe . vritta . ©
© surabhūjātada bījamaṁ kaḷedukoṁḍaṁtā sudhābiṁduviṁ poredartthārtthigaḷāśe yeṁba dhareyoḷu
kāruṇyaparjjanyamaṁ suridaṁbhōruhasaṁbhavaṁ paḍedu bittalu puṭṭi baṁdirddu puruṣā kārada kalpavri
kṣavenipaṁ śrī nākadaṁḍādhipaṁ . Ā nākarājavibhugaṁ mānini guṇaniḷaye cāmi yakkaṁgaṁ vidyā
nidhi kāśyapagōtrāṁbhōnidhisasi yīsvaraṁ magaṁ janiyisidaṁ . Ātaṁgaṁ sakaḷajanakhyāte guṇōpēte ko
mmikabbegamogadaṁ nūtanaguttana vinayavinūtaṁ śrī nākarājanamaḷiṇa tēja . sura bhūjaṁ mara
vaṭṭu meyigaredudoḍaṁ saggadoḷu mattamā paruṣaṁ kallerddeyāytudāraguṇamaṁ biṭṭeyde
meyiviṭṭu siddharasaṁ siddharasaṁgaḷoḷu toḍarddudaṁnārittaparmmartyareṁdiradirsākṣara
bēḍu nākarasanaṁ ś®vipramārtaṁḍana . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍa ḷēśva
raṁ tagaranagarādhīsvaraṁ siḷāṟavaṁṣōdubhavaṁ parahitabyasana jīmūtavāhanānvayapra
sūta boṭṭineṟega girivajradaṁḍa cennamanneyapannegavainatēya siṁganaṁkakāṟa nāmādi samastapra
sastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ sōyidēvarasaru veraṁgalla prabhu vairijanacintāmaṇiyuṁ
bhāradvājagōtrāṁbaradyumaṇiyumenisidapparasa naṁdiyarasananvayaveṁteṁdoḍe . vritta . caritaṁ ni
rduritaṁ manaṁ śivapadēkadhyānasaṁsthānavaṇmaribriṁdakṣayakāri cāgavadhanaṁgāpaddhana mūrtti bhāsura
kāntānayanōdayōtsavamenalu sāmānyanē sajjanābharaṇaṁ sadguṇi naṁdivarmma rathinīnāthaṁ ma
hībhāgadoḷu . Ā naṁdivarmmanaṁgane bhūnārige ratigarundhatidēvige lakṣmīnārige paḍiyene bhūnute tāṁ
cākaṇabbe kāṁtāratuna . Ā daṁpatige tanūbhavarādarśrīnāgavarmmadaṇḍādhipanuṁ bhūdēvānvaya
kamaḷavanādityaṁ negardda kēśavādityanavaṁ . siṁgarasaṁ puṭṭidanuttuṁgayaśaṁ negardda nāgavarma camū
nāthaṁgavamaḷāṁgi guṇanidhi gaṁgege samanenipa jakka ṇabbegamolaviṁ . guṇanidhi sōmāṁbi
kegaṁ raṇadōhaḷanenipa kēśavādityaṁgaṁ praṇutajagaṁ janiyisidaṁ guṇaniḷayaṁ sōma namaḷalakṣmīdhāma . sōmadaṁ
ḍādhipaṁgaṁ bhūmige samanenisidāciyakkaṁgaṁ kaḷvāmahījātakkaṁkuravī mahigo gevante nandirāja
nudāra . vacana . singarasaṁgaṁ siriyādēvigaṁ dēkiyakkanuṁ tamma kēśavādityanuṁ puṭṭi yā dēkiyakkaṁgappa
rājaṁ puṭṭidanā kēśavādityaṁgaṁ sōmadēvigaṁ puṭṭidaḷu . Aḷinīḷāḷaki haṁsagāmini latātanvāṁgi biṁ
bōṣThe nirmmaḷacaṁdrānane kaṁbukaṁThe vidaḷatpāṭhīnadriguyugme kōkiḷanādāṁcite tuṁgavrittakuceyeṁ
bī rūpiniṁ pōlvarāreḷeyoḷu pēḷu sirivēviyaṁ varakaḷāsaṁpanneyaṁ cenneya . Ākeya manaḥpriya
lakṣmīkāntaṁ viśadakīrtti manasijarūpākāranamarēṁdravibhavaṁ lōkaprastutyanapparājaṁ negaḷdaṁ . viḷasaddānavaśēṣa
vaṁdijanatānandapradaṁ kīrttidigpaḷayāḷaṁkritakāminīcihuramallīdāmavārtteyaniścaḷa maṁtraṁ patisaṁ
padābhyudayamendānandadiṁdoldu bhūvaḷeyaṁ baṇṇisalapparājanadhikaprakhyātiyaṁ tāḷdi daṁ . Inatējaṁ naṁ
dirājaṁ sakaḷaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkritaṁ naṁdirājaṁ manamārggaṁ naṁdirājaṁ sakaḷasukavirakṣākṣa
maṁ naṁdirājaṁ ghanasatvaṁ naṁdirājaṁ parahitacaritaṁ nōrppaḍī naṁdirājaṁ vanadhibyā vēṣṭitōrvvītaḷadoḷadhikabhā
gyādhikaṁ naṁdirāja . sāntiseṭṭiyanvayaveṁtene . jananutanapratarkyamahimāspadanoppuva sāṁtima
yyanātana sati peṁpināgaramenippa guṇāṁbudhi bācikabbe tattaneyanagaṇyapuṇyanidhi śūdrakuḷāṁ
baratigmarōci nōntana nidhi māci baṁdujanakaḷpakujaṁ negaḷdaṁ dharitriyoḷu . Ā mā cimayyaṁgaṁ jakki
yakkaṁgaṁ puṭṭida . sthirasatvaṁ mahimāṁburāsi puruṣārtthādhiṣṭitaṁ sadguṇābharaṇaṁ sajjanakāmadhēnu
venisippākhyānadiṁdirddanī dhareyoḷu sadguṇi sāntiseṭṭi piriduṁ dharmakke janī śvarapādāṁbujabhṛṁ
ganeṁbudu jagaṁ kaiyikoṇḍu kaiyivāradiṁ . Antā sāntiseṭṭi māḍisida keṟeya pā ḷibandhanakkeṁdu
kōmagaṭṭiṁge baṁdu śrīmaccāḷukyapratāpacakravarttijagadēkamalladēvavarṣada 9 ne ya Akṣaya saṁ
vatsarada puṣya suddha 6 sōmavāradaṁdinuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiparbba nimitta vāgi śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
ḷēśvaraṁ sōyidēvarasaru veraṁgallaprabhuvapparasanuṁ naṁdimarasanuṁ mēlāḷkeya perggaḍe nā
karasanumirddu haḷḷadiṁ mūḍalu Ekkaṁciya baṭṭeyiṁ baḍagalu biṭṭa keyi māṇikēśvarada
mattaru hattu Aṁkadoḷaṁ mattaru 10 Ī dharmavaṁ prabhugaḷuṁ manneyaruṁ mēlāḷkeyuṁ prati
pāḷisuvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi miṣṭā
krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
